project.name: Cascada Library - SQL Compiler
project.description: Apache Calcite-based compiler (the Java analogue of sqlglot): canonical-object extraction (ported from cache_component_adapter.py and smart_sql_processor), MySQL to Spark dialect translation (the 100+ function-mapping table from data_explory/all_plans.md), and the gap-query builder (ported from sql_rewriter.py). Calcite is an adapter-level dependency; the produced CanonicalQueryObject is pure domain.
